headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Everest Group, Raises Price Target to $380
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains Everest Group (NYSE:EG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $377 to $380.

raw.headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Everest Group, Raises Price Target to $380
raw.summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains Everest Group (NYSE:EG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $377 to $380.

headline: What to Expect From Everest Group's Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Everest Group will release its first-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a triple-digit bottom-line growth.
